text: Aaj khane par papa ne announce kar diya ki main apni onsite opportunity chhod rahi hoon kyunki ghar par bachhe ko meri zaroorat hai. Mummy ne turant rona shuru kiya aur boli ki meri ambition ki wajah se unka BP badh gaya hai aur 'sab tumhari wajah se ho raha hai'. Mera dimaag sunn ho gaya hai, bas rona nikal raha hai aur samajh nahi aa raha ki life me aage kya hoga.

Bina mujhse pooche papa ne decide kiya ki hum gaon shift ho jayenge taaki sab joint family sath reh sakein aur main WFH karun. Mummy ne taana maara ki meri 'shahar wali azaadi' ki wajah se ghar mein kalesh hota hai aur unka sar samaj mein neecha ho raha hai. Itni ghabrahat aur dukh ho raha hai ki main kuch soch hi nahi pa rahi, bas siskiyaan nikal rahi hain.

Papa ne aaj announce kiya ki meri salary ka bada hissa ab chacha ji ke bete ki shaadi mein jayega. Mummy ne seene pe haath rakh kar bol diya ki meri financial independence ki zidd unhe shamshaan pahuncha degi aur unka heart kamzor ho gaya hai. Mera gala rone se bhara hua hai, itni zyada flood of emotions hai ki main agli sprint ki planning ke baare mein soch bhi nahi pa raha.

Aaj subah papa ne decide kiya ki main ab MNC chhod kar gaon mein local sarkari naukri ki taiyari karungi taaki 'maryada' bani rahe. Mummy ne rona-dhona shuru kar diya ki meri wajah se unhe roz papa ki dant sunni padti hai aur 'log kya kahenge' ki beti haath se nikal gayi. Mujhe itna gussa aur frustration mehsus ho raha hai ki mera dimaag kaam karna band kar gaya hai, bas akele baith kar rona aa raha hai.

Bina meri marzi ke papa ne ghar ka renovation shuru karwa diya aur meri savings use karne ka announce kar diya. Mummy keh rahi hain ki 'sab tumhari wajah se ho raha hai' aur agar maine paise nahi diye toh wo zeher kha lengi kyunki unka sukh-chain chheen gaya hai. Main poori tarah se toot gayi hoon, bas rona hi nikal raha hai aur future bilkul andhera lag raha hai.
